# Test vulnerability source name mapping

# Test that CVE from github datasource is mapped to NVD (not GITHUB)
exec vens generate --llm=mock --config-file=config.yaml --sbom-serial-number=urn:uuid:3e671687-395b-41f5-a30f-a58921a69b79 trivy_cve_from_ghsa.json output1.cdx.json
exists output1.cdx.json

# CVE should be mapped to NVD regardless of datasource
json-contains output1.cdx.json 'CVE-2024-9999'
json-contains output1.cdx.json '"name": "NVD"'

# Test GHSA stays as GITHUB
exec vens generate --llm=mock --config-file=config.yaml --sbom-serial-number=urn:uuid:3e671687-395b-41f5-a30f-a58921a69b79 grype_ghsa.json output2.cdx.json
exists output2.cdx.json
json-contains output2.cdx.json 'GHSA-abcd-1234-efgh'
json-contains output2.cdx.json '"name": "GITHUB"'

-- config.yaml --
project:
  name: "source-mapping-test"
context:
  exposure: "internet"
  data_sensitivity: "high"
  business_criticality: "critical"
-- trivy_cve_from_ghsa.json --
{
  "SchemaVersion": 2,
  "Results": [
    {
      "Target": "test",
      "Vulnerabilities": [
        {
          "VulnerabilityID": "CVE-2024-9999",
          "PkgID": "pkg@1.0.0",
          "PkgName": "pkg",
          "InstalledVersion": "1.0.0",
          "FixedVersion": "2.0.0",
          "Title": "Test vulnerability",
          "Description": "A test CVE that comes from GitHub datasource",
          "Severity": "HIGH",
          "DataSource": {
            "ID": "ghsa",
            "Name": "GitHub Security Advisory",
            "URL": "https://github.com/advisories"
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
-- grype_ghsa.json --
{
  "matches": [
    {
      "vulnerability": {
        "id": "GHSA-abcd-1234-efgh",
        "namespace": "github:language:go",
        "severity": "High",
        "description": "A GHSA vulnerability"
      },
      "artifact": {
        "id": "xyz789",
        "name": "go-package",
        "version": "1.0.0",
        "type": "go-module",
        "purl": "pkg:golang/go-package@1.0.0"
      }
    }
  ],
  "descriptor": {
    "name": "grype",
    "version": "0.74.0"
  }
}
